introSection: Mamba is a steel out and back hyper roller coaster located at Worlds of Fun in Kansas City, Missouri, USA. The ride was built by Morgan at a cost of $10 million and opened on April 18, 1998. It was the third Morgan hyper to open at a Cedar Fair park.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
In September 1997, Worlds of Fun announced that they would be adding Mamba. The ride officially opened on April 18, 1998.

The ride's trains received new wheels for the 2019 season.

The ride was repainted green for the 2025 season.

fullText:
Mamba is a steel out and back hyper roller coaster located at Worlds of Fun in Kansas City, Missouri, USA. The ride was built by Morgan at a cost of $10 million and opened on April 18, 1998. It was the third Morgan hyper to open at a Cedar Fair park.

In September 1997, Worlds of Fun announced that they would be adding Mamba. The ride officially opened on April 18, 1998.

The ride's trains received new wheels for the 2019 season.

The ride was repainted green for the 2025 season.
